repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Individual quires; quires 1-9 unsewn, quires 10-13a (ff. 73-98) barely attached, and quires 13b-14 (ff. 99-114) unsewn
Large, angular, slightly inclined uncial, with accents and breathings
Mistakes in foliation from ff. 104-114, with attempted corrections: f. 107 originally numbered 106, consecutive folios were numbered and corrected accordingly
Quires numbered 1 to 14 by scribe in top right; quire 13 numbered twice, on ff. 97 and 99, here distinguished as quire 13a and quire 13b
